title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: School Trip Payment
questions.text: The final payment for the castle trip is due on Friday. If you have already paid, please ignore this reminder. Students who need extra time should ask the office before the deadline.
questions.question: What does the notice say?

options.C: Some students should speak to the office soon.
options.A: Everyone must pay again by Friday.
options.B: The castle trip has a new deadline.

questions.explanation: Students needing extra time should ask before the deadline.

questions.heading: Message from Callum to Eve
questions.text: Eve, I’m sorry I missed your call. I was helping my little brother with homework. I’ve listened to your message, and yes, I can bring the speakers for the party.
questions.question: Why is Callum texting Eve?

options.A: To reply to a request she made earlier.
options.B: To ask her for help with homework.
options.C: To say he cannot attend the party.

questions.explanation: He replies to her message and agrees to bring the speakers.

questions.heading: Gym Class Notice
questions.text: Please put small bags in the lockers before the lesson. Large sports bags should stay against the wall near the door. This keeps the floor clear during warm-up exercises.
questions.question: What is the purpose of the notice?

options.B: To keep the gym safe for movement.
options.A: To stop students bringing sports bags.
options.C: To tell students where lessons begin.

questions.explanation: Bags must be stored safely to keep the floor clear.

questions.heading: From: Rosie / Subject: Book review
questions.text: I liked your review, but you explain too much of the ending. If someone hasn’t read the book, it might spoil the story for them. Could you change the final paragraph?
questions.question: What does Rosie think?

options.C: The review gives away too much information.
options.A: The review needs a longer ending.
options.B: The book’s ending should be explained more.

questions.explanation: Rosie says the review explains too much of the ending.

questions.heading: Homework Support
questions.text: Older students are available in Room 3 on Mondays to help with homework. They will not do the work for you, but they can explain questions and help you plan your answers.
questions.question: What help is offered?

options.A: Guidance on understanding and planning work.
options.B: Someone to complete homework for students.
options.C: Extra homework set by older students.

questions.explanation: Older students explain questions and help plan answers.
